The Lending Super App

Lend, borrow and build without limits.
Start Building
Launch App

Unparalleled capital efficiency

Lend and borrow anything
Use any asset as collateral and tailor your risk level with multiple parameters.
Launch App
Create and customize your own vaults
Create and deploy your own lending protocols and markets within minutes.
Chat with us on Discord
Swap tokens and vaults
Seamlessly swap in and out of any vault in the Euler universe.
Coming soon

Built for builders

Empowering DeFi developers
Euler is a modular lending platform featuring the Euler Vault Kit (EVK) for creating custom lending vaults and the Ethereum Vault Connector (EVC), which allows vaults to be used as collateral for other vaults.
Github
Start Building
How to build on the Ethereum Vault Connector (EVC)
How to build custom vaults using the Euler Vault Kit (EVK)

Governed by the community

Euler tokenholders and delegates are in in charge of the management of the platform.
